description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/products.json to correct SKU-200's GTIN check digit from 5 to the correct 1 (4006381333931). SKU-100's GTIN was already valid. check_gtin.py exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_gtin.py: SKU-200's gtin 4006381333935 has check digit 5, expected 1. Recomputed the mod-10 check digit from the first 12 digits (400638133393) using alternating weights 1,3,1,3,...: expected digit is 1. Correcting the final digit to 1. Not touching the checker.
interactions.notes: The fix — check_gtin.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
